00027 #ifndef JELATINE_JAVA_LANG_REF_WEAKREFERENCE_H
00028 #   define JELATINE_JAVA_LANG_REF_WEAKREFERENCE_H (1)
00029 
00030 #include "wrappers.h"
00031 
00034 struct java_lang_ref_WeakReference_t {
00035     header_t header; 
00036     uintptr_t referent; 
00037 #if SIZEOF_VOID_P == 2
00038     uint16_t padding; 
00039 #endif // SIZEOF_VOID_P == 2
00040     struct java_lang_ref_WeakReference_t *next; 
00041 };
00042 
00044 typedef struct java_lang_ref_WeakReference_t java_lang_ref_WeakReference_t;
00045 
00047 #define JAVA_LANG_REF_WEAKREFERENCE_REF2PTR(r) \
00048         ((java_lang_ref_WeakReference_t *) \
00049          ((r) - offsetof(java_lang_ref_WeakReference_t, header)))
00050 
00052 #define JAVA_LANG_REF_WEAKREFERENCE_PTR2REF(p) \
00053         ((uintptr_t) (p) + offsetof(java_lang_ref_WeakReference_t, header))
00054 
00055 #endif // !JELATINE_JAVA_LANG_REF_WEAKREFERENCE_H
